payload.name: Perplexity AI
payload.title: Perplexity AI

sections.content:
Prepare me for an upcoming meeting
Create a budget tracker from my spending
Set up a weekly review system every Sunday
Find decision-makers at a company
Find potential integration partners
Map out all businesses of a type in my area
Research a candidate before interview
Benchmark salary for a role
Build interactive talent market map
Write a one-page investor pitch
Find early customers and draft cold outreach
Build a financial model for my startup
Compare tools or frameworks and recommend one
Quiz me until I can recall it confidently
Create a study guide for a certification or exam
Build a working landing page for my product
Turn my idea into a functional prototype
Set up an automated email or Slack workflow
Track regulatory changes in my industry
Track my portfolio and alert me on big moves
Watch industry news and flag important stories
sections.heading: Try Computer
